textByHashes.4dd2900b686758d269f4abf7a3c71f706d277642: I'm Dusuri. I specialise in unique minerals that can't be found on Gielinor.
textByHashes.d8c9319dce19a2cf0ef31681f3830fec471a7e74: To be honest, we don't fully know. All we know is that they can be found within shooting stars.
textByHashes.130d7849d72df8e9b9ffcbf5e72f37a15d4bc716: That's right. They fall from the sky from time to time. They can be mined for the unique minerals that I specialise in.
textByHashes.5d6978b550e37ac8bf3d60c5343a740575f3bcf3: If you ever come across one, I'd be happy to trade you for any stardust you find.
textByHashes.43b8f582632ab8f8d7aa90b8cee30493238b6ac1: Wonderful. If you ever get any stardust from them, I'd be happy to trade you for it.
textByHashes.91ed613ad1fcbd6205f98517f2adaedbf472e53f: Not now, I'm afraid. Maybe another time.
textByHashes.00aa8029cdb9784cfa1f275b52ab49fdea3bf027: I have packs of gems and soft clay if they take your fancy. I also have some interesting star fragments that seem to be able to recolour certain metals.
textByHashes.3fd7e23d1acbe8ee0c84bb3e6406bd8818025b0f: Most notably, I have a unique ring that we found embedded within a star once. It seems to have magical properties that we don't fully understand. What we do know is that it can improve your skill while mining.
textByHashes.da8072316e28de0aa4b877fadd5b0ab35580332f: Not a lot really. All I know is that they fall from the sky from time to time and that you can mine them.
textByHashes.ee63ee70ad14e68d246b2b9f96bab28e8e391899: If you want to know more, there's an observatory near Ardougne that you might want to visit. They've done some research into them.
